message:
chore: bump client JS bundle size limit from 850KB to 860KB

Accommodate the slightly larger bundle from recent component additions
(AnimatedCounter, CharacterReveal, SwipeablePromptCard, etc.).

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -3,7 +3,7 @@
     "name": "Total Client Bundle (JS)",
     "path": ".next/static/chunks/**/*.js",
     "gzip": true,
-    "limit": "850 KB"
+    "limit": "860 KB"
   },
   {
     "name": "Total Client Bundle (CSS)",
